text: Retention Policy RP-17 states logs are kept 24 months. Clause C-12 requires compliance justification.
title: Policy Manual

text: Exception E-9 allows shorter retention only if legal hold is absent and compliance clause C-12 is satisfied.
title: Policy Appendix

text: The committee decided to keep logs for 24 months, justified by clause C-12 in RP-17.
title: Decision Memo

text: Engineering enforces a 24 month retention job. Deviations must cite clause C-12.
title: Implementation SOP

text: RP-17 means retention policy. C-12 is the compliance clause used for justification.
title: Glossary

text: Audit confirms decision memo references policy RP-17 and clause C-12.
title: Audit Note
